tasks.label: Build
args: "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvars64.bat" && conan install . -of=build --build=missing -s build_type=Debug -s arch=x86_64 -s compiler.cppstd=20 -o imgui/*:docking=True -c tools.cmake.cmaketoolchain:generator=Ninja -c tools.cmake.cmaketoolchain:toolset_arch=x64 && cmake -S . -B build -G Ninja -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=build\conan_toolchain.cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && cmake --build build
